scripts.codegen: python3 -c "import yaml, json; print(json.dumps(yaml.safe_load(open('./openapi.yaml'))))" > ./.openapi.codegen.json && orval --config ./orval.config.ts && python3 -c "import re; path='../api-zod/src/index.ts'; content=open(path).read(); open(path,'w').write(re.sub(r\"export \\* from './generated/types';\\n?\", '', content))" && rm -f ./.openapi.codegen.json
